data.markdown:
PRIVACY POLICY

**Privacy Policy for Commerce Launcher**

Effective Date: June 16, 2025

**1\. Introduction**

At Commerce Launcher, operated by Botio Co., Ltd. ("we," "us," or "our"), a company incorporated under the laws of Thailand, we value your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our Service, which enables service businesses ("Business Users") to sell digital e-vouchers, tickets, or coupons (collectively, "E-Vouchers") and physical items to their clients ("End Users"). This policy applies to all users, whether Business Users managing E-Vouchers or physical items or End Users purchasing them as guests or with an account.

**2\. Information We Collect**

We collect only the information necessary to process transactions, verify ownership, deliver E-Vouchers or physical items, and provide updates or reminders:

Personal Information:

For End Users:

Name, email address, telephone number, and Line ID for E-Voucher purchases to verify ownership, process transactions, and provide updates or reminders.

Shipping address for physical item purchases to facilitate delivery

**For Business Users:** Business name, contact details (e.g., email, phone), and account information.

**Transaction Information:** Details about E-Voucher or physical item purchases (e.g., item type, amount, date).

**Automatically Collected Data:** Device information (e.g., IP address, browser type) and usage data (e.g., pages visited) to ensure the Service functions properly.

Note: We do not store credit card information. Payments are processed securely by third-party payment providers.

**3\. How We Collect Information**

Directly from You:

End Users: When you enter information (e.g., name, email, telephone, Line ID, shipping address) during checkout or account creation.

Business Users: When you provide business or account details during registration or E-Voucher/physical item setup.

Automatically: Through cookies or similar technologies to collect usage data and improve the Service.

**4\. How We Use Your Information**

We use your information to:

Verify ownership of purchased E-Vouchers using your email and telephone number.

Process and complete E-Voucher and physical item transactions.

Deliver E-Vouchers to End Users via their provided email or Line ID.

Ship physical items to the provided shipping address.

Send payment status updates, E-Voucher delivery confirmations, physical item shipping updates, and reminders via email or Line.

Enable Business Users to manage and sell E-Vouchers and physical items.

Communicate with you about your account, purchases, or item management.

With your explicit consent, allow Business Users to add your email to their promotional subscription lists for marketing purposes related to E-Vouchers or physical items (you may opt out at any time).

Improve and maintain the Service (e.g., analyzing usage patterns).

Comply with legal obligations, including Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

**5\. Data Sharing**

We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except:

**Service Providers:** We share data with trusted third parties (e.g., payment processors, email or Line delivery services, shipping providers) to facilitate transactions, E-Voucher delivery, or physical item shipping.

**Business Users:** End User data (e.g., name, email, telephone, Line ID, shipping address) may be shared with the relevant Business User to verify ownership, fulfill E-Voucher redemption, deliver physical items, provide updates, or, with your consent, send promotional emails.

**Legal Requirements:** We may disclose data if required by law or to protect our rights, safety, or property.

**Business Transfers:** If we are involved in a merger or sale, your data may be transferred as part of the transaction.

**6\. Data Storage and Security**

**Storage:** Your data is stored on secure servers in Thailand or other jurisdictions as necessary.

**Security:** We use industry-standard measures (e.g., encryption, access controls) to protect your data. However, no system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

**No Credit Card Storage:** We do not store credit card information on our servers.

**7\. Your Rights**

Under Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) and other applicable laws (e.g., GDPR, CCPA), you may have rights to:
Access, correct, or delete your personal information.

Object to or restrict certain data processing.

Request a copy of your data in a portable format.

Opt out of promotional emails from Business Users by following unsubscribe instructions or contacting the Business User.

To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@botio.io. We will respond within the timeframes required by law (e.g., 30 days under PDPA or GDPR).

**8\. Cookies and Tracking**

We use cookies to ensure the Service functions properly (e.g., maintaining your session during checkout or account management).

You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

**9\. Data Retention**

We retain your personal information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy (e.g., to deliver E-Vouchers, ship physical items, verify ownership, or comply with legal obligations).

Transaction data may be retained for accounting or legal purposes as required by Thai law.

**10\. International Data Transfers**

If you are located outside Thailand, your data may be transferred to and processed in Thailand or other countries. We ensure appropriate safeguards (e.g., Standard Contractual Clauses) for international transfers as required by law.

**11\. Children's Privacy**

The Service is not intended for users under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13 (or 16 in some jurisdictions). If we learn such data has been collected, we will delete it.

**12\. Changes to This Policy**

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email, Line, or a notice on the Service. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

**13\. Contact Us**

For questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at [hello@botio.io](mailto:hello@botio.io) or 304/829 Paholyothin 49/1 Yak 1-2, Taradbangkhen, Bangkok, 10210, Thailand.

Discover

primary.reasoning: Button #1 with text 'Accept' uses a vibrant blue color (#1E88E5), which is typically associated with primary actions. It also has a 'primary' class, indicating its importance.

secondary.reasoning: Button #0 with text 'Discover' uses a distinct vibrant orange color (#C69A5E), making it suitable as a secondary action. It is from a different color group than the primary button.

PRIVACY POLICY

Privacy Policy for Commerce Launcher

Effective Date: June 16, 2025

1. Introduction
At Commerce Launcher, operated by Botio Co., Ltd. ("we," "us," or "our"), a company incorporated under the laws of Thailand, we value your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information when you use our Service, which enables service businesses ("Business Users") to sell digital e-vouchers, tickets, or coupons (collectively, "E-Vouchers") and physical items to their clients ("End Users"). This policy applies to all users, whether Business Users managing E-Vouchers or physical items or End Users purchasing them as guests or with an account.

2. Information We Collect
We collect only the information necessary to process transactions, verify ownership, deliver E-Vouchers or physical items, and provide updates or reminders:
Personal Information:

Shipping address for physical item purchases to facilitate delivery
For Business Users: Business name, contact details (e.g., email, phone), and account information.
Transaction Information: Details about E-Voucher or physical item purchases (e.g., item type, amount, date).

Note: We do not store credit card information. Payments are processed securely by third-party payment providers.

3. How We Collect Information
Directly from You:

Business Users: When you provide business or account details during registration or E-Voucher/physical item setup.
Automatically: Through cookies or similar technologies to collect usage data and improve the Service.

4. How We Use Your Information
We use your information to:
Verify ownership of purchased E-Vouchers using your email and telephone number.
Process and complete E-Voucher and physical item transactions.
Deliver E-Vouchers to End Users via their provided email or Line ID.
Ship physical items to the provided shipping address.
Send payment status updates, E-Voucher delivery confirmations, physical item shipping updates, and reminders via email or Line.
Enable Business Users to manage and sell E-Vouchers and physical items.
Communicate with you about your account, purchases, or item management.
With your explicit consent, allow Business Users to add your email to their promotional subscription lists for marketing purposes related to E-Vouchers or physical items (you may opt out at any time).
Improve and maintain the Service (e.g., analyzing usage patterns).
Comply with legal obligations, including Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

5. Data Sharing
We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except:
Service Providers: We share data with trusted third parties (e.g., payment processors, email or Line delivery services, shipping providers) to facilitate transactions, E-Voucher delivery, or physical item shipping.
Business Users: End User data (e.g., name, email, telephone, Line ID, shipping address) may be shared with the relevant Business User to verify ownership, fulfill E-Voucher redemption, deliver physical items, provide updates, or, with your consent, send promotional emails.
Legal Requirements: We may disclose data if required by law or to protect our rights, safety, or property.
Business Transfers: If we are involved in a merger or sale, your data may be transferred as part of the transaction.

6. Data Storage and Security
Storage: Your data is stored on secure servers in Thailand or other jurisdictions as necessary.
Security: We use industry-standard measures (e.g., encryption, access controls) to protect your data. However, no system is completely secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
No Credit Card Storage: We do not store credit card information on our servers.

7. Your Rights
Under Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA) and other applicable laws (e.g., GDPR, CCPA), you may have rights to: Access, correct, or delete your personal information.
Object to or restrict certain data processing.
Request a copy of your data in a portable format.
Opt out of promotional emails from Business Users by following unsubscribe instructions or contacting the Business User.
To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@botio.io. We will respond within the timeframes required by law (e.g., 30 days under PDPA or GDPR).

8. Cookies and Tracking
We use cookies to ensure the Service functions properly (e.g., maintaining your session during checkout or account management).
You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

9. Data Retention
We retain your personal information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy (e.g., to deliver E-Vouchers, ship physical items, verify ownership, or comply with legal obligations).
Transaction data may be retained for accounting or legal purposes as required by Thai law.

10. International Data Transfers
If you are located outside Thailand, your data may be transferred to and processed in Thailand or other countries. We ensure appropriate safeguards (e.g., Standard Contractual Clauses) for international transfers as required by law.

11. Children's Privacy
The Service is not intended for users under 18. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13 (or 16 in some jurisdictions). If we learn such data has been collected, we will delete it.

12. Changes to This Policy
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email, Line, or a notice on the Service. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

13. Contact Us
For questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at hello@botio.io or 304/829 Paholyothin 49/1 Yak 1-2, Taradbangkhen, Bangkok, 10210, Thailand.
